title: Hal Puthoff on levitation!
summary: Jesse Michels recounts a conversation with Hal Puthoff about potential mechanisms behind UFO phenomena, where Puthoff suggested an unconventional theory involving medieval secret societies with knowledge of levitation rather than purely scientific explanations.

key_claims.claim: Hal Puthoff suggested that a medieval secret society may know how to levitate and put metal capsules around people
The levitation history may be tied in with the UFO story
The human body may be more integral to UFO phenomena than scientific explanations involving warp drives
